seo.metaTitle: White-Label Online Fax for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Offer secure, cloud-based fax under your brand. Hostopia's white-label Online Fax replaces legacy fax machines with HIPAA-aligned, email-integrated digital faxing.

hero.headline: Replace Legacy Fax Machines — Keep Trusted Workflows
hero.subheadline: Many SMBs still rely on fax for contracts, medical records, and legal documents. Legacy fax machines are costly, insecure, and tied to physical offices.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Online Fax lets you deliver a secure, cloud-based fax service that modernizes how your SMB customers send and receive documents — without changing the workflows they depend on. A natural add-on to your connectivity and communications portfolio.

items.title: Fax from anywhere
items.body: Send and receive faxes from any device with an internet connection — no hardware, no phone lines, no office required.

image.alt: Working remotely with mobile and cloud tools

items.title: Stay compliant
items.body: Encrypted transmission and HIPAA-aligned configurations for healthcare, legal, and financial industries.

items.title: Keep existing numbers
items.body: Easy number porting migrates customers off legacy lines, or activate new local and toll-free numbers.

image.alt: Business phone and fax number management

items.title: Simplify workflows
items.body: Email-to-fax, fax-to-email, and web portal access eliminate the need for separate fax software.

heroImage.alt: Modern digital fax and document transmission

features.heading: Modern Fax Infrastructure — Without the Infrastructure
features.intro: Online Fax replaces physical machines with a secure, digital experience that works the way SMBs already work — through email and browser.

cards.title: Email & Web-Based Faxing
cards.body: Send faxes directly from email or a web portal. Support for PDF, DOC, PPT, and image formats. No additional software required.

cards.title: Security & Compliance
cards.body: Encrypted transmission with HIPAA-aligned configurations. Built for industries that handle sensitive documents — healthcare, legal, financial.

cards.title: Multi-User Plans
cards.body: Shared page pools for teams, admin roles, usage reporting, and per-number tracking. Scale from solo practitioners to multi-location businesses.

cards.title: Productivity Tools
cards.body: Cover pages, group sends, delivery confirmations, and centralized fax logs. Everything SMBs need to manage document workflows efficiently.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Monetize a Critical Communication Channel
partnerAdvantage.intro: Online Fax modernizes a service SMBs can't give up — and turns it into a recurring cloud subscription on your platform.

items.title: Create stickier bundles
items.body: Pair Online Fax with connectivity, VoIP, and business email. The more communication services on your platform, the harder it is for customers to leave.

items.title: Convert analog users to cloud subscriptions
items.body: Migrate customers off legacy fax lines and hardware while keeping them on your network. Every converted line is new recurring revenue.

items.title: Low support, high attach
items.body: Browser- and email-based experience means minimal support burden. Hostopia maintains the platform — you sell the service.

lifecycleFit.heading: A Communications Add-On That Complements Your Core
lifecycleFit.intro: Online Fax sits alongside business email and connectivity services — a communications layer that strengthens your bundle and increases wallet share.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting launch their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Online Fax, ecommerce, and advanced services support document-heavy and regulated industries.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position Online Fax as a communications bundle partner with email and VoIP, a compliance solution for regulated industries, and a modernization play to retire legacy fax hardware.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn Online Fax into a High-Value Communications Add-On?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch your branded Online Fax service, migrate existing fax users, and bundle it with the connectivity and digital services you already sell.
